name: Dharma

skills.name: Heart Meridian Mantra
skills.description: When using skills, he gains Physical and Magical Defense,as well as enhanced basic atacks that inflict extra damage and slow.

skills.name: Formlessness Mantra
skills.description: Dashes forward, dealing damage to enemies and crowd controling them.

skills.name: Enlightenment Mantra
skills.description: Damages enemies in front of him and recovers health

skills.name: Truth Mantra
skills.description: Damages nearby enemies and knocks them back.If an enemy is knocked back into a wall , they take extra damage and are stunned.

tips: Dharma (Tank): Tier B on international ranked — 52.16% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 52.16%, pick 0.21%, ban 0.02%, popularity tier B.
Counters Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin · Weak into Xiang Yu, Diaochan.

faqs.question: Is Dharma good in current season?
faqs.answer: Dharma is Tier B Tank with 52.16% win rate, 0.21% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Dharma build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Dharma?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Dharma: Xiang Yu, Diaochan. Dharma is strong into Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Wang Zhaojun, Han Xin. Countered by: Xiang Yu, Diaochan.
